name: obsidian-any-task
description: Customizes checkbox icons based on task content and theme.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm-run-all --parallel build:js build:css && npm run build:assets
scripts.deploy:sync: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; [ -n "$DEPLOY_PATH" ] && cp -rv dist/* "$DEPLOY_PATH" || echo 'DEPLOY_PATH not set in .env, skipping sync'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:sync
scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run deploy
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run deploy
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run deploy

author: HMage <highmagician@gmail.com>
